name: Black Bottom Ice Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
Spread the softened chocolate ice cream in the bottom of the crust. Cover and freeze until firm.
Spread the softened vanilla ice cream over the chocolate layer. Cover and freeze until firm.
Combine the chocolate morsels and whipping cream in a small heavy saucepan. Cook over low heat until the chocolate melts, stirring constantly.
Remove from heat and stir in the vanilla extract. Cool completely.
Drizzle the cooled sauce over the top of the pie. Freeze until ready to serve.
